description.value:
Trigger You would take persistent bleed damage.

The unique anatomy of talphis, wherein your loose skin hides your neck and extends to your elbows and knees, makes your body look much larger than it actually is and has plenty of give to resist more serious damage. When you're struck by an attack that would do persistent bleed damage, roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, you steer the blow into a relatively safe part of your body, and the condition ends immediately.
